description.content: Operations for managing content items including documents, presentations, and other sales materials.

description.content:
API for managing and accessing content within the Seismic platform, including documents, presentations, and other sales enablement materials. Provides capabilities to upload, organize, search, deliver, and manage content items, folders, and content properties within the Seismic content management system.

Contact Support:
 Name: Seismic Support
 Email: support@seismic.com
